mechanism_narrative: Persistently high federal funds rates increase the cost of capital for businesses and reduce the present value of future earnings, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of periods where FEDFUNDS is above its 10-year average.

mechanism_narrative: A significant increase in the unemployment rate signals a deteriorating labor market and broader economic contraction, which reduces corporate earnings expectations and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.3 percentage points over the prior 3 months
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Robust growth in retail sales combined with strong housing starts indicates healthy consumer demand and investment, boosting corporate revenues and leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month annualized growth > 5% AND HOUST 3-month average > 1.5 million units
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 40% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained high inflation coupled with restrictive monetary policy (high federal funds rate) erodes corporate profit margins and increases borrowing costs, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of periods where CPIAUCSL > 3% YoY and FEDFUNDS > 4%.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in industrial production indicates weakening manufacturing activity and broader economic slowdown, which negatively impacts corporate earnings and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over a short 5-day horizon.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent growth in non-farm payrolls reflects a strong labor market and robust economic activity, supporting consumer spending and corporate profits, which leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of periods where PAYEMS 3-month average growth is positive.

mechanism_narrative: Decelerating GDP growth combined with a high federal funds rate indicates an economic slowdown under tight monetary conditions, which reduces corporate earnings and investor confidence, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
regime_hint: economic slowdown with tight monetary policy
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of periods where GDPC1 QoQ growth is below 1% and FEDFUNDS > 4%.

mechanism_narrative: A year-over-year decline in retail sales indicates weakening consumer demand and potential economic contraction, which negatively impacts corporate revenues and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 20-day horizon.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite negative signal.
